services.title: Tower Restaurant
services.tagline: Sky-high dining with panoramic valley views
services.intro: Enjoy signature flavors, warm service, and unforgettable scenery from one of the most memorable dining spots at Harness.
services.description: The Tower Restaurant brings together elevated dining, local hospitality, and a dramatic natural backdrop. Whether you are stopping in for a relaxed lunch, sunset tea, or a celebratory dinner, the setting turns every meal into an occasion.
services.longDescription: Designed for guests who want more than a standard restaurant experience, this space combines open views, comfortable seating, and a menu built around fresh ingredients and crowd-favorite dishes. It is ideal for couples, families, and groups looking to slow down, connect, and enjoy the atmosphere as much as the food.
features: Ideal for breakfast, lunch, and dinner
Great spot for photos and celebrations
Comfortable setting for groups and families

services.title: Wedding Destination
services.tagline: Celebrate your big day in a setting made for memories
services.intro: From intimate ceremonies to lively celebrations, Harness offers a romantic natural backdrop for a truly unforgettable wedding experience.
services.description: Our wedding destination service is crafted for couples who want a celebration that feels personal, scenic, and full of atmosphere. The resort setting creates space for ceremonies, receptions, portraits, and guest stays all in one destination.
services.longDescription: With dramatic landscapes, cozy accommodations, and a team ready to support your event flow, Harness is a strong choice for destination weddings, engagements, anniversaries, and private celebrations. The venue allows you to blend relaxation, hospitality, and adventure into one seamless experience for you and your guests.
features: Suitable for intimate and mid-size events

services.title: Conference Room
services.tagline: A focused venue for meetings, retreats, and events
services.intro: Host productive sessions in a peaceful environment that helps teams gather, plan, and reconnect away from the usual routine.
services.description: The Conference Room is suited for professional meetings, team retreats, workshops, and private gatherings that need a comfortable and organized setting within the resort.
services.longDescription: Harness offers a refreshing alternative to city venues by pairing practical event space with natural surroundings and on-site hospitality. It works especially well for company off-sites, training sessions, planning meetings, and small private events where both concentration and comfort matter.
features: Useful for meetings, workshops, and retreats
Convenient access to food and accommodation
Works for both professional and private events
